Her uncle was murdered; a parent and sibling died recently; her brother nearly died in an accident; a partner tried to kill her; she was ghosted after moving countries for him; she lost a child; her car was destroyed; a friend robbed her; her house burned down; she helped her mother through another addiction spiral; she searched swampland for a family member's body; she lost everything three times; and a man welcomed into her home recently threatened the women there with death and sexual violence. She is emotionally exhausted, physically sick from stress, and losing her hair
notes: Saturn sign inferred from 1H; Saturn and NN retrograde; also mentions a 7H Scorpio stellium conjunct Chiron, Lilith, Juno, and Aura, plus 8H Pluto
text: Taurus rising, Saturn rx in 1st h, I do have a Libra Venus but in 6th h, north node in Leo 4th h retrograde. I do have a 7th h Scorpio stellium conjunct Chiron Lilith Juno and aura and an 8th h Pluto so it could be impacted by that but I just want someone to show some form of love or reciprocal care, a home that is my own, a job I like, I want to be able to create everyday and have a community to care for. For context, I was bullied out of one job by other women, gained 2 stalkers and was sexually harassed at another job, this job I’m currently being harassed. No one who has shown interest in me has had it be past physical and has treated me as disposable and I’m struggling to trust my own reality and have closed myself off to other people entirely because I’m emotionally exhausted. My uncle was murdered, a parent and a sibling died recently, my brother had a huge accident and almost passed away, a partner attempted to 💀 me, I was ghosted when I moved country for him the moment I landed, I lost a child, car was destroyed, was robbed by a friend, my house burnt down, I had to help my mother recover from another addiction spiral, I had to walk through swamp land to look for a family members body, I lost everything three times over, also some guy that had been welcomed into my home threatened the lives of myself and the other women in the house and threatened us with sexual violence literally the other week. This has been a wild ride, what I want is so simple and because I attract violent or broken people, bad situations surrounding any sort of reciprocity, being punished for existing in any kind of community environment, being put in awful situations anytime I try to befriend or attempt to help anyone, losing people closest to me etc I tried to look at myself and see where I was going wrong, after working on myself a lot and a lot of therapy I still attracted those situations so now I’ve closed off and I panic whenever anyone attempts to befriend me or approach me romantically, I have for the past week been a mess emotionally every single night, I’ve been so stressed my hair is falling out and I’m physically sick. This is quite the time.

Such as meal vouchers through app corporations connecting them with food banks and restaurants offering a meal each day. Food scarcity is a mindset the big guys want us to believe but in reality we waste so much every day. TooGoodToGo helps but not every family can afford or have the resources to purchase them. I have attracted many lessons in letting go, prioritizing internal validation over people pleasing, and allowing myself to be seen.

dreams: Grew up dreaming of being a writer; now wants to feel stable

text:
Venus in Libra, 6H.
Saturn in Libra, 6H.
North Node in Leo, 4H.
I grew up dreaming of being a writer but that's all I really cared about.
Now, I just want to feel stable. these past few months has had a lot of life decision changes.
I attract people that need advice or instruction on how to do things. I'm a Virgo Sun so I do it automatically.

dreams: To be comfortable, stable, and full of abundance
lessons_attracted: Feels she attracts the opposite of comfort, stability, and abundance
text: Venus in Libra in the 6th, north node in Leo 4h, Saturn 1h Taurus. I want to be comfortable, stable and full of abundance. I feel like I attract the opposite of those things.

dreams: Become a business owner and be financially free to travel the world
lessons_attracted: Attracts troubled people trying to become stable; lessons about boundaries, being used as a servant, and trying to fix everyone
life_events: Lost all her family, survived foster care, and had lifelong job trouble until finding work she wanted to keep two years ago
notes: NN house inferred from sign; says she thrives in alone time
text: Taurus rising. Saturn in the 12th in Aries, nn in Virgo. Venus in Sagittarius 8th house. Lost all my family, foster care survivor. Had job trouble all my life up until 2 years ago I found something I wanna stick with. I attract people who are a little troubled but try to be stable. I’ve learned a lot of lessons. My dreams are to be a business owner and to be financially free to travel the world. My life lesson is def something to do with boundaries and letting people use me as a servant/ I try to fix everyone. I thrive in alone time
